$comment: AMS2 vehicle class -> real F1 seasons, verified against the local install's .crd data (build 23820506, 2026-07-02) - NOT the stale research rename guesses. ams2Class is the exact case-sensitive internal class name (= CustomAIDrivers filename base and classes.json xmlName). realSeasons are the championship years the class credibly represents (from research + community consensus). gameYear is what the install's .crd files say, kept for traceability where it differs from the era.

f1Ladder.notes: 2 models; Lotus 49 / Repco Brabham analogues. Chosen career start era.
4 models incl. Brabham BT26A, Lotus 49C.
5 models incl. Lotus 72E, McLaren M23, Brabham BT44.
Incl. Lotus 79, BT46B fan car, BT49 (BRL DLC).
Incl. MP4/1C, BT52 (BRL DLC).
Incl. Lotus 98T (BRL DLC).
M1 top NA / M2 mid NA / M3 turbo; + MP4/4 (BRL DLC). Reference-pack era #2.
One-car class (MP4/6); the MP4/5 (1989) .crd also sits in this class per game data.
Lowercase 't' confirmed in game data (research wrote F-HiTech). Formula HiTech DLC; + MP4/7A. _HD/_LD downforce sub-classes exist.
+ MP4/8. _HD/_LD sub-classes exist.
Internal name for Formula Edge Gen1 (formula_edge_g1m1/2/3: V12/V10/V8). F-V12 (1 car, 1995) still coexists as its own class - NOT renamed.
Formula_V10_M (2002) variant model exists in-class.
Renault R25 era; .crd says 2006 - treat as 2005 per community consensus.
Incl. Renault R26 analogue.
Incl. R28. No F-V8_Gen3 exists in game data.
NOT renamed to F-V8_Gen3 (research was wrong); single 2010-spec car covering the 2011-13 V8 era.
No F-Hybrid family exists in game data - research renames were display-level at most.
.crd for formula_ultimate_2016 carries year 2019 (game data quirk).
Missing from the research era table entirely; newest hybrid-era class.

juniorLadder.notes: Karts: 5 stock variants (KartGX390, KartRental, KartShifter, SuperKart, KartCross as Kartcross).

fUsa.notes: CART 1995: cart_lola_t95_*, cart_reynard_95i_* per-engine cars; _SO/_SS/_SW track-config classes exist alongside.
Present in install; absent from research table.
